name: GBGallery
author: Giant Bomb Engineering
description: Provides a <gb-gallery> parser tag for rendering external image galleries from the legacy Giant Bomb CDN.

GBGalleryBaseUrl.description: Base URL for legacy image CDN, without trailing slash.

GBGalleryThumbSize.description: Size variant used for gallery grid thumbnails.

GBGalleryFullSize.description: Size variant used for click-through full-size view.
